subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I bear witness, and the Manifestations of Thy Beauty bear witness, that Thou hast ever been sanctified above all description [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهدک و مظاهر جمالک بانک انت لم تزل کنت مقدسا عن وصف
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @prayer for forgiveness
